text.arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِـرْ لي ، رَبِّ اغْفِـرْ لي

translations.en: Lord, forgive me. My Lord, forgive me.

items.reference: Abu Dawud 1/231. See also Al-Albani, Sahihibn Mdjah 1/148.

text.arabic:
اللّهُـمَّ اغْفِـرْ لي ، وَارْحَمْـني ،
وَاهْدِنـي ، وَاجْبُرْنـي ،
وَعافِنـي وَارْزُقْنـي وَارْفَعْـني
text.transliteration:
Allāhumma’ghfir lī, war’ḥamnī,
wahdinī, wajburnī,
wa `āfinī, warzuqnī, warfa`nī.

translations.en:
O Allah forgive me, have mercy on me,
guide me, support me,
protect me, provide for me, and elevate me.

items.reference:
Abu Dawud, Ibn Majah, At-Tirmidhi. See also Al-Albani, Sahih At-Tirmidhi
1/90 and Sahih Ibn Majah 1/148.
